playlists.name: Drums of War
playlists.summary: Martial percussion and low brass for long campaigns across hex and counter.

playlists.name: Iron Rails
playlists.summary: Steady, driving themes for stock rounds and track-laying marathons.

playlists.name: Meeple Meadows
playlists.summary: Warm pastoral strings and woodwinds for worker placement evenings.

playlists.name: Candlelit Crypts
playlists.summary: Torchlit corridors, distant drums, and the clink of looted gold.

playlists.name: Eldritch Static
playlists.summary: Unsettling drones and whispered choirs for cooperative horror nights.

playlists.name: Starlane Drift
playlists.summary: Weightless synth pads for engine building among the stars.

playlists.name: Tavern Tales
playlists.summary: Lutes, fiddles, and clinking mugs for lighthearted fantasy romps.

playlists.name: Quick Draw
playlists.summary: Snappy, bright loops for fillers and roll-and-writes between rounds.

playlists.name: Duel at Dawn
playlists.summary: Coiled-spring tension for head-to-head duels and gambits.

playlists.name: Solo Night
playlists.summary: Intimate piano and soft static for late-night solitaire campaigns.

playlists.name: Kindled Fellowship
playlists.summary: Hopeful, swelling themes for co-ops where everyone wins or no one does.

playlists.name: Shuffle & Spark
playlists.summary: Crisp electro-swing energy for deck builders and combo turns.

playlists.name: Glass Lines
playlists.summary: Minimal, crystalline patterns for abstracts and perfect information.

playlists.name: Banner Clash
playlists.summary: Anthemic team-versus-team energy for shouting across the table.

playlists.name: Steam & Steel
playlists.summary: Pistons, furnaces, and dividend bells for industrial empires.

playlists.name: Engine Room
playlists.summary: Clockwork rhythms for engine builders and point-salad perfectionists.

playlists.name: Cozy Meadow
playlists.summary: Gentle folk melodies for families, birds, and quiet valleys.
